mapper.insert: insert into operation_logs( module, operation, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, description, old_value, new_value, operator_id, operator_name, ip_address, user_agent, status, error_msg, execution_time ) values( #{module}, #{operation}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{entityName}, #{description}, #{oldValue}, #{newValue}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{executionTime} )
mapper.select: select id, module, operation, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, description, old_value, new_value, operator_id, operator_name, ip_address, user_agent, status, error_msg, execution_time, created_at from operation_logs where module = #{module} and ( entity_name = #{entityNamePrefix} or entity_name like concat(#{entityNamePrefix}, '/%') ) order by created_at desc

select id, module, operation, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, description, old_value, new_value, operator_id, operator_name, ip_address, user_agent, status, error_msg, execution_time, created_at from operation_logs where id = #{id}
